allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'], r.get\('html_url',''\)\) for r in d.get\('workflow_runs',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for job in d.get\('jobs',[]\): print\('JOB:', job['name'], job['conclusion']\) for step in job.get\('steps',[]\): if step['conclusion'] not in \('success', 'skipped'\): print\(' STEP FAILED:', step['name'], step['conclusion']\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('source:', d.get\('source',{}\)\); print\('build_type:', d.get\('build_type',''\)\)")
